notes:
Game runs perfectly, but crashes when alt-tabbing in full-screen mode.
It's preferable to run the game in windowed mode for the time being.

notes: Runs mostly fine, except from occasional choppy sound and bad behaviour after alt-tabbing from fullscreen (game becomes tiny). Installing xact in the game's pfx reduced but didn't eliminate the choppiness.
title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション

notes: WineD3D fixes an error concerning dxd11 when launching. Everything seems to work correctly with the exception of fullscreen mode and alt-tabing which causes a weird case where the game appears tiny in the top left corner of the screen. It is however possible to get back to the game by pressing alt+enter. You can also reproduce this issue by changing the display mode to fullscreen (or maybe there's a borderless mode?). Windowed works flawlessly and fullscreen too given no alt-tabing is done.
title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション

notes: Just as native. Tested with Steam Overlay and using a Steam Controller with Xbox bindings without any problem. Integrated perfectly to the desktop (using i3wm could be treated as any other window, including toggling fullscreen and moving to other workspaces).

notes: Generally fine, but the game freezes (music continues) when other window or tool tip is covering the game. Tried on KDE with and without compositor.

notes: Works almost perfectly. Poor behavior when alt-tabbing from fullscreen , but recoverable after multiple tries to bring back the window.
title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション

notes: Had to enable WineD3D or the game wouldn't start at all. I played a whole case from start to finish on full screen and vsync on and didn't notice anything wrong in the game itself except the "Cross-Examination" start animation stuttering. Could alt-tab from the game without problems but couldn't alt-tab back to it, had to "manually" restore the game's window by clicking on its icon on the dock.
title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション

notes: works perfectly after setting "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" in the launch options.
title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション
Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション

notes: The game is very playable. When the game dips in FPS audio can get artifacts. The game seems to be hardwired to run on 60 frames. I have not been able to get past the 1-5: Rise From the Ashes credits because the game crashes. I haven't been able to get the achievement, which is sad. However; since it's a unity game the developers could bring a proper port if there is enough demand, which should resolve all these minor issues.
title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy / 逆転裁判123 成歩堂セレクション
